title: andryala pinnatifida subsp. cuneifolia
intro: Andryala pinnatifida subsp. cuneifolia is a rare plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its unique, deeply divided leaves. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from digestive problems, reduction of inflammation, and protection against oxidative stress. Andryala pinnatifida subsp. cuneifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity.
